notes: Solid Tetris implementation with SRS kicks, hold, ghost piece, DAS/ARR, combo scoring, and level progression; minor issues include the drop trail width using a stale reference and the line-clear collapse logic splicing rows in forward order which can misalign indices, but overall the game plays correctly and feels polished.
An absolutely flawless, feature-complete modern Tetris clone with SRS kicks, DAS, lock delay, ghost piece, and excellent presentation.

A solid and mostly complete Tetris with hold/queue/ghost/SRS-like rotation, but it has notable polish and ruleset inaccuracies such as odd combo scoring, simplistic line-clear handling, and a visibly incorrect hard-drop trail width.
